# Valid MCP Tool Overview

This article passes all checks.

[!INCLUDE [tip-about-params](../includes/tools/parameter-consideration.md)]

## Tool: Do Something

<!-- tool do-something -->

Does something useful.

Example prompts include:

- **Do the thing**: "Please do the thing."

| Parameter | Required or optional | Description |
|-----------|----------------------|-------------|
| **Resource group** | Required | The resource group name. |
| **Name** | Optional | The resource name. |

**Success verification**: Returns confirmation.

## Tool: Do Another Thing

<!-- tool do-another-thing -->

Does another useful thing.

| Parameter | Required or optional | Description |
|-----------|----------------------|-------------|
| **Subscription** | Required | The subscription ID. |
